mapper.sql: id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, status, paid_at, transaction_no, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_payments (payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, status, paid_at, transaction_no, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{paymentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paidAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transactionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_payments (payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, status, paid_at, transaction_no, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.paymentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.payChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.payAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paidAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.transactionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_payments WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM client_payments WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_payments SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE client_payments SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
